name: Chicken & Pea Pods
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boned, Skinned Chicken (sliced into very thin strips)
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------
SAUCE
1. In a small saucepan, mix ½ cup Chicken broth, 2 tbsp Soy Sauce, 1 tbsp Cornstarch, and 1 tsp Sugar.
2. Stir until smooth and set aside.
3. In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of Oil over high heat.
4. Add the minced Garlic and Gingerroot, and stir-fry for about 30 seconds.
5. Add the sliced Chicken and stir-fry until no longer pink, about 2-3 minutes.
6. Remove the Chicken from the skillet and set aside.
7. In the same skillet, add the Carrot Strips and Celery. Stir-fry for 1 minute.
8. Add the Green Onion Slices and stir-fry for an additional 30 seconds.
9. Add the Water Chestnuts and Frozen Chinese Pea Pods to the skillet.
10. Pour in the Sauce mixture and stir until everything is coated.
11. Cook, stirring frequently, until boiling. Return the Chicken to the skillet and heat through for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Serve hot with steamed rice or noodles.
